meta.importedFrom: Unit 4 Passage 2 Circle of Goodwill（互动课文教学动画）英语新教材外研版八年级下册.html

article.title: Circle of Goodwill
article.summary: 在善意不断传递的循环中，理解帮助他人的价值。

sentences.text: It was just before 2:30 pm in my hometown, Wenchuan.
sentences.tr: 那是在我的家乡汶川，下午2:30之前。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: It指代时间。just before意为“就在...之前”。

sentences.text: I was having a music lesson at school.
sentences.tr: 我当时正在学校上音乐课。
sentences.g: 过去进行时
sentences.d: was having表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作。

sentences.text: Suddenly, the ground shook hard and I was thrown to the floor.
sentences.tr: 突然，地面剧烈摇晃，我被摔到了地板上。
sentences.g: 并列复合句
sentences.d: shook是shake的过去式。was thrown是被动语态。

sentences.text: People were shouting all around me.
sentences.tr: 周围的人都在尖叫。
sentences.g: 过去进行时
sentences.d: all around me意为“在我周围”。

sentences.text: I jumped to my feet and rushed outside.
sentences.tr: 我一跃而起，冲向室外。
sentences.g: 并列谓语
sentences.d: jump to one's feet意为“跳起来，一跃而起”。

sentences.text: I was shocked to find all the other buildings were reduced to pieces.
sentences.tr: 我震惊地发现所有其他的建筑都变成了碎片。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语 + 不定式
sentences.d: be shocked to do sth. 震惊地做某事。reduce to pieces 变成碎片。

sentences.text: I was shaking all over with fear.
sentences.tr: 我全身因恐惧而发抖。
sentences.g: 过去进行时
sentences.d: shake all over 全身发抖。with fear 因为恐惧。

sentences.text: Then, a pair of strong hands reached out to me – I was saved.
sentences.tr: 这时，一双有力的大手伸向了我——我获救了。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 状语
sentences.d: reach out to 伸向。was saved 被动语态。

sentences.text: I can never forget those soldiers, firemen, doctors and nurses.
sentences.tr: 我永远忘不了那些士兵、消防员、医生和护士。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: can never forget 永远忘不了。

sentences.text: Day and night, they raced against time to save as many people as possible.
sentences.tr: 他们日以继夜地与时间赛跑，尽可能多地救人。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 目的状语
sentences.d: race against time 与时间赛跑。as...as possible 尽可能...。

sentences.text: I was deeply touched by their courage and hard work.
sentences.tr: 我被他们的勇气和努力深深打动了。
sentences.g: 被动语态
sentences.d: be touched by 被...打动。

sentences.text: So I made up my mind to become one of them.
sentences.tr: 所以我下定决心要成为他们中的一员。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: make up one's mind 下定决心。

sentences.text: And I did! I graduated from college and became a nurse.
sentences.tr: 我做到了！我大学毕业后成为了一名护士。
sentences.g: 并列谓语
sentences.d: graduate from 从...毕业。

sentences.text: One day, I heard another hospital needed support.
sentences.tr: 有一天，我听说另一家医院需要支援。
sentences.g: 宾语从句
sentences.d: heard后面省略了that引导的宾语从句。

sentences.text: Right away, I signed up to help.
sentences.tr: 我立刻报名去帮忙。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 目的状语
sentences.d: right away 立刻。sign up 报名。

sentences.text: I still remembered the warmth of those helping hands 12 years ago.
sentences.tr: 我仍然记得12年前那些援助之手的温暖。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
sentences.d: warmth 是 warm 的名词形式。

sentences.text: It was time for me to offer mine.
sentences.tr: 轮到我伸出援手了。
sentences.g: It is time for sb. to do 句型
sentences.d: mine指代my helping hands。

sentences.text: The work was by no means easy.
sentences.tr: 这项工作绝非易事。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: by no means 绝不，一点也不。

sentences.text: The head nurse, Ye Man, gave me a lot of help.
sentences.tr: 护士长叶曼给了我很多帮助。
sentences.g: 主语 + 谓语 + 间接宾语 + 直接宾语
sentences.d: Ye Man是The head nurse的同位语。

sentences.text: For me, she was a patient teacher and a kind friend.
sentences.tr: 对我来说，她是一位耐心的老师，也是一位善良的朋友。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: patient 既可以做名词“病人”，也可以做形容词“耐心的”。

sentences.text: However, this wasn't the beginning of our connection.
sentences.tr: 然而，这并不是我们联系的开始。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
sentences.d: 不是。它是 was not 的缩写形式

sentences.text: She had offered a helping hand to Wenchuan 12 years ago.
sentences.tr: 12年前，她曾向汶川伸出过援助之手。
sentences.g: 过去完成时
sentences.d: had offered 表示在过去（12年前）已经发生的动作。

sentences.text: Can you imagine my surprise?
sentences.tr: 你能想象我的惊讶吗？
sentences.g: 疑问句
sentences.d: imagine 想象。surprise 惊讶。

sentences.text: At that time she was my age, and also a new nurse, just like me!
sentences.tr: 那时她和我现在的年纪一样大，也是一名新护士，就像我一样！
sentences.g: 并列复合句
sentences.d: my age 意为“我的年纪”。just like 就像。

sentences.text: Even today, I still feel lucky to have had such an amazing experience in life.
sentences.tr: 即使在今天，我仍然觉得在生命中拥有这样一段奇妙的经历是很幸运的。
sentences.g: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语 + 不定式
sentences.d: feel lucky to do 觉得做某事很幸运。

sentences.text: Love leads to love, and so creates a circle of goodwill and kindness.
sentences.tr: 爱引发爱，从而创造了一个善意和仁慈的循环。
sentences.g: 并列复合句
sentences.d: lead to 导致，引发。goodwill 善意。

vocabItems.meaningZh: art. 一个（用于元音音素前）
v. 有，吃，进行（have 的现在分词）
v. 摇晃（shake 的过去式）
adv. 剧烈地，努力地；adj. 努力的，硬的
v. 投，掷（throw 的过去分词形式）
v. 是（be 的过去式复数）
v. 尖叫，大喊（shout 的现在分词）
v. 跳跃（jump 的过去式）
v. 冲，奔（rush 的过去式）
adj. 震惊的（shock 的过去分词）
n. 建筑物（building 的复数）
v. 减少，使变成（reduce 的过去分词）
n. 方式，方法；by no means 绝不。这是 mean 的名词复数形式。
v. 发抖，摇晃（shake 的现在分词）
v. 到达，伸出（reach 的过去式）
v. 救助，节省（save 的过去分词形式）
n. 消防员（fireman 的复数）
v. 赛跑，争分夺秒（race 的过去式）
adv. 同样地 conj. 当...时
adj. 感动的（touch 的过去分词）
v. 制作（make 的过去式）
v. 毕业（graduate 的过去式）
v. 成为（become 的过去式）
v. 听到（hear 的过去式）
v. 需要（need 的过去式）
v. 签名，报名（sign 的过去式）
v. 记得（remember 的过去式）
adj. 帮助的（help 的现在分词）
pron. 我的（名词性物主代词）
adj. 耐心的 n. 病人
adj. 善良的 n. 种类
不是。它是 was not 的缩写形式
v. 提供（offer 的过去分词）
v. 有（have 的过去式）；v. 有（have 的过去分词）
v. 导致，引导（lead 的第三人称单数）
v. 创造（create 的第三人称单数）
pron. 那，那个 conj. 引导从句

readingQuestions.stem: What happened to the author 12 years ago?
options: A. She became a nurse
B. She was saved in an earthquake
C. She met Ye Man in college
D. She moved to another city
readingQuestions.answer: B. She was saved in an earthquake
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 第一段描述了汶川地震中作者被救的经历。

readingQuestions.stem: Why did the author decide to become a nurse?
options: A. Because her parents wanted her to
B. Because she liked music lessons
C. Because she was touched by the rescuers
D. Because it was an easy job
readingQuestions.answer: C. Because she was touched by the rescuers
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 第二段提到作者被救援人员的勇气打动，下定决心成为他们中的一员。

readingQuestions.stem: What surprising connection between the author and Ye Man?
options: A. They were in the same college
B. Ye Man was the author's music teacher
C. Ye Man had helped Wenchuan 12 years ago
D. They were born in the same hometown
readingQuestions.answer: C. Ye Man had helped Wenchuan 12 years ago
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 第四段揭示了叶曼12年前也曾支援过汶川。

readingQuestions.stem: What does the author mean by 'It was time for me to offer mine' in the text?
options: A. It was time for her to graduate from college
B. It was time for her to help others as she was helped
C. It was time for her to find a new job in the hospital
D. It was time for her to return to her hometown Wenchuan
readingQuestions.answer: B. It was time for her to help others as she was helped
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 文中'mine'指代'helping hands'，作者认为现在轮到自己像当年被救助一样去帮助别人了。

readingQuestions.stem: What does 'Love leads to love' mean in the text?
options: A. Love is a circle of kindness
B. People only love their family
C. Love is hard to find
D. You should love your job
readingQuestions.answer: A. Love is a circle of kindness
readingQuestions.rationaleZh: 最后一段总结了爱心的传递创造了善意的循环。

an.meaningZh: art. 一个（用于元音音素前）

having.meaningZh: v. 有，吃，进行（have 的现在分词）

shook.meaningZh: v. 摇晃（shake 的过去式）

hard.meaningZh: adv. 剧烈地，努力地；adj. 努力的，硬的

thrown.meaningZh: v. 投，掷（throw 的过去分词形式）

were.meaningZh: v. 是（be 的过去式复数）

shouting.meaningZh: v. 尖叫，大喊（shout 的现在分词）

jumped.meaningZh: v. 跳跃（jump 的过去式）

rushed.meaningZh: v. 冲，奔（rush 的过去式）

shocked.meaningZh: adj. 震惊的（shock 的过去分词）

buildings.meaningZh: n. 建筑物（building 的复数）

reduced.meaningZh: v. 减少，使变成（reduce 的过去分词）

means.meaningZh: n. 方式，方法；by no means 绝不。这是 mean 的名词复数形式。

shaking.meaningZh: v. 发抖，摇晃（shake 的现在分词）

reached.meaningZh: v. 到达，伸出（reach 的过去式）

saved.meaningZh: v. 救助，节省（save 的过去分词形式）

firemen.meaningZh: n. 消防员（fireman 的复数）

raced.meaningZh: v. 赛跑，争分夺秒（race 的过去式）

as.meaningZh: adv. 同样地 conj. 当...时

touched.meaningZh: adj. 感动的（touch 的过去分词）

made.meaningZh: v. 制作（make 的过去式）

graduated.meaningZh: v. 毕业（graduate 的过去式）

became.meaningZh: v. 成为（become 的过去式）

heard.meaningZh: v. 听到（hear 的过去式）

needed.meaningZh: v. 需要（need 的过去式）

signed.meaningZh: v. 签名，报名（sign 的过去式）

remembered.meaningZh: v. 记得（remember 的过去式）

helping.meaningZh: adj. 帮助的（help 的现在分词）

mine.meaningZh: pron. 我的（名词性物主代词）

patient.meaningZh: adj. 耐心的 n. 病人

kind.meaningZh: adj. 善良的 n. 种类

wasn't.meaningZh: 不是。它是 was not 的缩写形式

offered.meaningZh: v. 提供（offer 的过去分词）

had.meaningZh: v. 有（have 的过去式）；v. 有（have 的过去分词）

leads.meaningZh: v. 导致，引导（lead 的第三人称单数）

creates.meaningZh: v. 创造（create 的第三人称单数）

that.meaningZh: pron. 那，那个 conj. 引导从句
